name: wordle_minigame
description: A player Wordle-style 5-letter guessing minigame where active guesses are submitted through chat and hidden from public chat.
globals: (function() { var words = ['apple','brick','crown','delta','eagle','flame','grape','honey','ivory','jelly','knife','lemon','magic','noble','ocean','pearl','queen','river','stone','tiger','unity','vivid','whale','xenon','young','zebra','adore','blaze','charm','dream','ember','frost','glory','haste','ideal','jolly','karma','lunar','mirth','novel','orbit','pride','quest','raven','shard','torch','ultra','valor','woven','yeast','zesty','cabin','daisy','fairy','giant','harsh','index','judge','kneel','mango','north','piano','quiet','rally','salty','table','urban','vapor','waltz']; function pickWord() { return words[Math.floor(Math.random() * words.length)]; } function isValidGuess(g) { return /^[a-zA-Z]{5}$/.test(g); } function scoreGuess(guess, answer) { guess = guess.toLowerCase(); answer = answer.toLowerCase(); var result = ['gray','gray','gray','gray','gray']; var counts = {}; for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) { if (guess.charAt(i) === answer.charAt(i)) { result[i] = 'green'; } else { var c = answer.charAt(i); counts[c] = (counts[c] || 0) + 1; } } for (var j = 0; j < 5; j++) { if (result[j] === 'green') continue; var gc = guess.charAt(j); if ((counts[gc] || 0) > 0) { result[j] = 'yellow'; counts[gc]--; } } return result; } function renderGuess(guess, answer) { var score = scoreGuess(guess, answer); var out = ''; for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) { var ch = guess.charAt(i).toUpperCase(); if (score[i] === 'green') out += '&a[' + ch + ']'; else if (score[i] === 'yellow') out += '&e[' + ch + ']'; else out += '&8[' + ch + ']'; } return out; } function sendBoard(player, game) { player.sendMessage('&6&m----------------&r &eWordle &6&m----------------'); for (var i = 0; i < game.guesses.length; i++) player.sendMessage(renderGuess(game.guesses[i], game.word)); for (var r = game.guesses.length; r < game.max; r++) player.sendMessage('&7[_][_][_][_][_]'); player.sendMessage('&7Guesses: &f' + game.guesses.length + '&7/&f' + game.max); } function getStatsTable() { return database.table('wordle_stats'); } function defaultStats() { return { games: 0, wins: 0, losses: 0, streak: 0, bestStreak: 0, guesses: [0,0,0,0,0,0] }; } function loadStats(id) { var t = getStatsTable(); if (!t.has(id)) return defaultStats(); var s = t.get(id); if (!s.guesses) s.guesses = [0,0,0,0,0,0]; return s; } function saveStats(id, s) { getStatsTable().put(id, s); } function recordWin(player, attempts) { var id = player.getId(); var s = loadStats(id); s.games++; s.wins++; s.streak++; if (s.streak > s.bestStreak) s.bestStreak = s.streak; if (!s.guesses) s.guesses = [0,0,0,0,0,0]; s.guesses[attempts - 1] = (s.guesses[attempts - 1] || 0) + 1; saveStats(id, s); } function recordLoss(player) { var id = player.getId(); var s = loadStats(id); s.games++; s.losses++; s.streak = 0; saveStats(id, s); } function processGuess(player, guess) { var id = player.getId(); guess = String(guess || '').trim().toLowerCase(); var game = this.sessions[id]; if (!game) { player.sendMessage('&cYou do not have an active Wordle game. Use &e/wordle start&c.'); return; } if (!isValidGuess(guess)) { player.sendMessage('&cYour Wordle guess must be exactly 5 letters. Use &e/wordle quit &cto chat normally again.'); return; } if (game.guesses.indexOf(guess) >= 0) { player.sendMessage('&cYou already guessed &e' + guess.toUpperCase() + '&c.'); return; } game.guesses.push(guess); sendBoard(player, game); if (guess === game.word) { var attempts = game.guesses.length; player.sendMessage('&aCorrect! You solved it in &e' + attempts + '&a/' + game.max + '&a guesses.'); recordWin(player, attempts); delete this.sessions[id]; player.playSound('minecraft:entity.player.levelup', 1.0, 1.0); return; } if (game.guesses.length >= game.max) { player.sendMessage('&cOut of guesses! The word was &e' + game.word.toUpperCase() + '&c.'); recordLoss(player); delete this.sessions[id]; player.playSound('minecraft:entity.villager.no', 1.0, 1.0); return; } player.sendMessage('&7Keep trying! &f' + (game.max - game.guesses.length) + '&7 guesses left.'); player.playSound('minecraft:block.note_block.hat', 0.8, 1.0); } return { sessions: {}, words: words, pickWord: pickWord, isValidGuess: isValidGuess, scoreGuess: scoreGuess, renderGuess: renderGuess, sendBoard: sendBoard, loadStats: loadStats, saveStats: saveStats, recordWin: recordWin, recordLoss: recordLoss, processGuess: processGuess }; })

commands.label: wordle
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var id = player.getId(); var args = ctx.getArgs(); function help() { player.sendMessage('&6&m----------------&r &eWordle Help &6&m----------------'); player.sendMessage('&e/wordle start &7- Start a new puzzle'); player.sendMessage('&eType a 5-letter word in chat &7- Make a hidden guess'); player.sendMessage('&e/wordle board &7- Show your current board'); player.sendMessage('&e/wordle stats &7- Show your stats'); player.sendMessage('&e/wordle quit &7- End your current puzzle'); player.sendMessage('&7Your chat guesses are cancelled, so other players will not see them.'); player.sendMessage('&7Colors: &aGreen = correct spot&7, &eYellow = wrong spot&7, &8Gray = absent'); } if (!args || args.length === 0) { help(); return; } var sub = String(args[0]).toLowerCase(); if (sub === 'start' || sub === 'new') { if (state.sessions[id]) { player.sendMessage('&cYou already have a Wordle game. Use &e/wordle board &cor &e/wordle quit&c.'); return; } state.sessions[id] = { word: state.pickWord(), guesses: [], max: 6 }; player.sendMessage('&aStarted a new Wordle puzzle! Type a 5-letter word in chat to guess.'); player.sendMessage('&7Your guess messages will be hidden from public chat.'); state.sendBoard(player, state.sessions[id]); player.playSound('minecraft:block.note_block.pling', 1.0, 1.2); return; } if (sub === 'help') { help(); return; } if (sub === 'board') { var boardGame = state.sessions[id]; if (!boardGame) { player.sendMessage('&cYou do not have an active game. Use &e/wordle start&c.'); return; } state.sendBoard(player, boardGame); return; } if (sub === 'quit' || sub === 'end' || sub === 'stop') { var quitGame = state.sessions[id]; if (!quitGame) { player.sendMessage('&cYou do not have an active game.'); return; } player.sendMessage('&cWordle ended. The word was &e' + quitGame.word.toUpperCase() + '&c.'); delete state.sessions[id]; player.playSound('minecraft:block.note_block.bass', 1.0, 0.7); return; } if (sub === 'stats') { var s = state.loadStats(id); var rate = s.games > 0 ? Math.round((s.wins * 1000 / s.games)) / 10 : 0; player.sendMessage('&6&m----------------&r &eWordle Stats &6&m----------------'); player.sendMessage('&7Games: &f' + s.games + ' &7Wins: &a' + s.wins + ' &7Losses: &c' + s.losses); player.sendMessage('&7Win Rate: &e' + rate + '% &7Current Streak: &b' + s.streak + ' &7Best: &d' + s.bestStreak); var dist = s.guesses || [0,0,0,0,0,0]; for (var di = 0; di < 6; di++) player.sendMessage('&7' + (di + 1) + ': &f' + (dist[di] || 0)); return; } if (sub === 'guess' || state.isValidGuess(sub)) { player.sendMessage('&eWordle guesses are made in chat now. Type your 5-letter guess as a normal chat message while your game is active.'); return; } help(); })

events.code: (function(ctx, state) { var player = ctx.getPlayer(); if (!player) return; var id = player.getId(); if (!state.sessions[id]) return; if (ctx.isCancellable()) ctx.setCancelled(true); var msg = String(ctx.getMessage() || '').trim(); state.processGuess.call(state, player, msg); })
